name: xfer
description: Seamlessly view and migrate AI coding sessions between Claude Code and Codex CLI

scripts.app:dev: npm run app:icons && npm run build:ui && tauri dev
scripts.app:build:exe: npm run app:icons && node scripts/clean-release-exe.mjs && npm run build:ui && tauri build --no-bundle
scripts.app:build:win: npm run app:icons && node scripts/clean-release-exe.mjs && npm run build:ui && node scripts/package-win.mjs && node scripts/stage-versioned-bundles.mjs win-x64
scripts.app:build:mac: npm run app:icons && npm run build:ui && tauri build --bundles app,dmg && node scripts/stage-versioned-bundles.mjs
scripts.app:build:linux: npm run app:icons && npm run build:ui && tauri build --bundles appimage,deb,rpm && node scripts/stage-versioned-bundles.mjs
scripts.app:package: npm run app:icons && npm run build:ui && tauri build && node scripts/stage-versioned-bundles.mjs
scripts.app:portable:mac: npm run app:icons && npm run build:ui && tauri build --no-bundle && node scripts/package-portable.mjs
scripts.app:portable:linux: npm run app:icons && npm run build:ui && tauri build --no-bundle && node scripts/package-portable.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:ui && npm run smoke
